records.ety: [OE. daft, deft, becoming, mild, gentle, stupid (cf. OE. daffe, deffe, fool, coward), AS. dæft (in derivatives only) mild, gentle, fitting, seasonable; akin to dafen, gedafen, becoming, fit, Goth. gadaban to be fit. Cf. Daft, Daff, Dapper.]

quotes: Let me be deft and debonair.

defs: dexterous; clever; handy; as, a deft feat of legerdemain.
quotes: The limping god, so deft at his new ministry.
